rationale: Gov't Code §2306.186 governs reserve accounts for multifamily rental housing developments. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption and contains no provision affected by raising the homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 2306.186. MANDATORY DEPOSITS TO FUND NECESSARY REPAIRS.
_note: No conflict; the rule addresses multifamily rental housing reserve accounts, not homestead property tax exemptions.
